节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Define class constructor with arbitrary parameters.

注释信息: @param { any } args the arguments of the constructor.

节点.功能描述: Define  ConnectOptions class.

注释信息: @type { TypeConstructorWithArgs<T> } type class type of the stored value.

节点.功能描述: Defines alias name of the key, or the function generating the default value.
Define the function generating the default value.
Define encrypted partition for data storage. if not passed in, the defaule value is El2
AppStorageV2 is for UI state of app-wide access, has same life cycle as the app, and saves database content only in memory.

If used by persistenceV2, module-level storage path, different modules will have their own storage paths. If the value for the given key is already available, return the value. If not, add the key with value generated by calling defaultFunc and return it to caller.
注释信息: @param { TypeConstructorWithArgs<T> } type class type of the stored value.
@param { string | StorageDefaultCreator<T> } [keyOrDefaultCreator] alias name of the key, or the function generating the default value.
@param { StorageDefaultCreator<T> } [defaultCreator] the function generating the default value
@returns { T | undefined } the value of the existed key or the default value
节点.return_description: the value of the existed key or the default value

节点.功能描述: Removes data with the given key or given class type.
注释信息: @param { string | TypeConstructorWithArgs<T> } keyOrType key or class type removing

节点.功能描述: Return the array of all keys.
注释信息: @returns { Array<string> } the array of all keys

节点.功能描述: Define ConnectOptionsCollections class. To be used with globalConnect for collection type return only. In this case defaultCreator and defaultSubCreator must be provided

Defines the function to create collection type defaultCreator is already defined in the base class but with more loose type StorageDefaultCreator<T> | undefined. Furthermore T is more strictly defined here.
Defines the function to create collection item type
PersistenceV2 is for UI state of app-wide access, available on app re-start, and saves database content in disk.

Application-level storage path, sharing a storage path for all modules under the application. If the value for the given key is already available, return the value. If not, add the key with value generated by calling defaultFunc and return it to caller.
注释信息: @param { ConnectOptions<T> } type Application level storage parameters.
@returns { T | undefined } the value of the existed key or the default value
节点.return_description: the value of the existed key or the default value

节点.功能描述: Application-level storage path, sharing a storage path for all modules under the application. If the value for the given key is already available, return the value. If not, add the key with value generated by calling defaultFunc and return it to caller. This variant of overloaded function is to be used when T is a collection class and both the defaultCreator and defaultSubCreator functions must be provided
注释信息: @param { ConnectOptionsCollections<T, S> | ConnectOptions<T> } type - Application level storage parameters.
@returns { T | undefined } the value of the existed key or the default value
节点.return_description: the value of the existed key or the default value

节点.功能描述: Used to manually persist data changes to disks.
注释信息: @param { string | TypeConstructorWithArgs<T> } keyOrType key or class type need to persist.

节点.功能描述: Be called when persisting has encountered an error.
注释信息: @param { PersistenceErrorCallback | undefined } callback called when error

节点.功能描述: Define TypeConstructor type.
UIUtils is a state management tool class for operating the observed data.
Get raw object from the Object wrapped with an ObservedObject. If input parameter is a regular Object without ObservedObject, return Object itself.
注释信息: @param { T } source input source Object data.
@returns { T } raw object from the Object wrapped with an ObservedObject.
节点.return_description: raw object from the Object wrapped with an ObservedObject.

节点.功能描述: Make non-observed data into V2 observed data. Support non-observed class, JSON.parse Object and Sendable class.
注释信息: @param { T } source input source object data.
@returns { T } V2 proxy object from the source object data.
节点.return_description: V2 proxy object from the source object data.

节点.功能描述: Make non-observed data into V1 observed data. Support JS object, interface, class (non-@Observed, non-ObservedV2).
注释信息: @param { T } source - input source object data.
@returns { T } V1 proxy object from the source object data.
节点.return_description: V1 proxy object from the source object data.

节点.功能描述: Enables V2 compatibility on given viewmodel object or nested viewmodels, which are V1 observed object already.
注释信息: @param { T } source - The object to be made V2-compatible.
@returns { T } The processed object with V2 compatibility enabled.
节点.return_description: The processed object with V2 compatibility enabled.

节点.功能描述: Dynamically add monitor for state variable change.
注释信息: @param { object } target class instance or custom component instance.
@param { string | string[] } path  monitored change for state variable.
@param { MonitorCallback } monitorCallback the function that triggers the callback when state variable change.
@throws { BusinessError } 130000 - The target is not a custom component instance or V2 class instance.
@throws { BusinessError } 130002 - monitorCallback is not a function or an anonymous function.

parameters.说明: class instance or custom component instance.
the function that triggers the callback when state variable change.

error_codes.description: The target is not a custom component instance or V2 class instance.
monitorCallback is not a function or an anonymous function.

节点.功能描述: Dynamically clear monitor callback for state variable change.

@throws { BusinessError } 130000 - The target is not a custom component instance or V2 class instance.

parameters.说明: class instance or custom component instance.
MonitorCallback } [monitorCallback] the function that triggers the callback when state variable change.

monitorCallback is not a function or an anonymous function.

节点.功能描述: Creates read-only data binding. Example. UIUtils.makeBinding<number>(()=>this.num); Supports simple getters for read-only data. Intended for primitive value parameters when calling a @Builder function where arguments are of type Binding.
注释信息: @param { GetterCallback<T> } getter - A value or a function that returns the current value of type T.

节点.功能描述: Creates a mutable data binding. Two functions to implement function overloading. Example. UIUtils.makeBinding<number>(()=>this.num, val => this.num = val); Supports getter-setter pairs for mutable data. Intended for primitive value parameters when calling a @Builder function where arguments are of type MutableBinding. If provided, a MutableBinding is created.
注释信息: @param { GetterCallback<T> } getter - A value or a function that returns the current value of type T.
@param { SetterCallback<T> } setter - A function to set a new value of type T.

节点.功能描述: Used to refresh the specified state variable synchronously, include update Computed, execute Monitor function and rerender UINodes. Calling applySync while executing task of another applySync executes the given task normally.
注释信息: @param { TaskCallback } task callback function to change state variable synchronously
@returns { T } the return value of the callback function
@throws { BusinessError } 140001 - The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed
节点.return_description: the return value of the callback function

error_codes.description: The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed

节点.功能描述: Used to refresh the all state variable synchronously, include update Computed, execute Monitor function and rerender UINodes. Calling flushUpdates() while exec applySync lambda has no effect.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 140001 - The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed
@throws { BusinessError } 140002 - The function is not allowed to be called in @Monitor

error_codes.description: The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed
The function is not allowed to be called in @Monitor

节点.功能描述: Used to update all UINode currently synchronously. Calling flushUIUpdates() while exec applySync lambda has no effect.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 140001 - The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed
@throws { BusinessError } 140002 - The function is not allowed to be called in @Monitor

error_codes.description: The function is not allowed to be called in @Computed
The function is not allowed to be called in @Monitor

节点.功能描述: Determine whether the data object is observable and return the observation result.
注释信息: @param { T } source - input source object data.
@returns { ObservedResult } return result of whether a class is observable.
节点.return_description: return result of whether a class is observable.

节点.功能描述: The getLifecycle function gets the lifecycle instance of the class CustomComponent.
注释信息: @returns { CustomComponentLifecycle } The lifecycle that the custom component belongs to.
节点.return_description: The lifecycle that the custom component belongs to.

节点.功能描述: Define Monitor options.
Used to determine whether the state variable change is triggered synchronously or asynchronously. The default value is false.
Represents a read-only data binding. Use with @Builder argument list for primitive types. Use makeBinding to pass values when calling the function.
Get function that can acquire the value.
Represents a mutable data binding allowing both read and write operations. Use with @Builder argument list for primitive types. Use makeBinding to pass values when calling the function.
Get function that can acquire the value.
Set function that can set the new value.
注释信息: @param { T } newValue - set the value with newValue.

节点.功能描述: The return result that defines whether the object data is observable.
Whether the object data of class/Array/Map/Set/Date type is observable. if true, the object data can be observed. if false, the object data can not be not observed.

Reasons why the object data of class/Array/Map/Set/Date type can not be not observed. 1 The object data is not an observable object. 2 The object data is observed data for the following reasons: 2.1 The object data is decorated with @Observed or wrapped by makeV1Observed. 2.2 The object data is decorated with V2 @ObservedV2 and @Trace. 2.3 The object data is wrapped by V2's makeObserved. 2.4 The object data is built-in type proxy data (Array/Map/Set/Date) decorated with @Trace. 2.5 The V1 Observed object data is wrapped by enableV2Compatibility and used in @ComponentV2. 2.6 The object data is decorated with @Observed or wrapped by makeV1Observed, but not used in UI. 2.7 The object data is decorated with V2 @ObservedV2 and @Trace, but not used in UI. 2.8 The object data is wrapped by V2's makeObserved, but not used in UI. 2.9 The object data is built-in type proxy data (Array/Map/Set/Date) decorated with @Trace, but not used in UI. 2.10 The V1 Observed object data is wrapped by enableV2Compatibility, but not used in @ComponentV2.
The UI component information associated with the object data. If the data object can not be observed, will return empty array.
The UI component information associated with the object data.
Decorator name of the object data.
State Variable name of the object data.
The custom component name that the object data belongs to. In the V1 scenario, return the custom component name, in the V2 @ObservedV2 scenario, return class name.
The custom component id that the object data belongs to. In the V1 scenario, return the custom component id, in the V2 @ObservedV2 scenario, return -1.

Dependent component information including custom component and UI component (Text, Image) for the object data. For the V2 @Monitor or @Computed scenario, will return the id and decorated function name by @Monitor or @Computed. For V2 scenario, if it is not used in the UI, nor on @Monitor or @Computed, return an empty array. For V1 scenario, if it is not used in the UI, will return an empty array.
The custom component and UI component information. For the V2 @Monitor or @Computed scenario, The id and decorated function name by @Monitor or @Computed will be returned.

Dependent custom component and UI component name. For the V2 @Monitor or @Computed scenario, elementName refers to the name of the decorator and the function name decorated with @Monitor or @Computed (eg: @Monitor onChange).
Dependent custom component and UI component id. For the V2 @Monitor or @Computed scenario, elementId refers to the id of the @Monitor or @Computed.
CustomComponent Lifecycle. It is used to monitor changes in the lifecycle of the custom component.
getCurrentState method is to get the current lifecycle state.
Register a lifecycle listener. When the lifecycle state of a custom component changes, the corresponding lifecycle callback will be triggered.
注释信息: @param { CustomComponentLifecycleObserver } observer - Custom component lifecycle observer.

节点.功能描述: Remove custom component lifecycle callbacks. Even if the custom component's lifecycle state changes, the lifecycle callback will not be triggered.
注释信息: @param { CustomComponentLifecycleObserver } observer - Custom component lifecycle observer.

节点.功能描述: CustomComponent LifecycleObserver. When a user registers a custom component lifecycle callback, the corresponding lifecycle callback will be triggered when the lifecycle changes.
The aboutToAppear function is executed after a new instance of the custom component is created, before its build() function is executed. Developers can modify state variables at this stage.

The onDidBuild function is executed after a new instance of the custom component is built, after its build() function is executed. Developers can implement functions that do not affect the actual UI, such as event data reporting at this stage.

The aboutToDisappear function executes before a custom component is destroyed. It is not allowed to change state variables within the `aboutToDisappear` function, especially since modifying @Link variables may lead to unstable application behavior.

Invoked when a reusable custom component is re-added to the node tree from the reuse cache to receive construction parameters of the component. When params is not undefined, it is the callback for reusing the V1 component. when params is undefined, it is the callback for reusing the V2 component.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, Object | undefined |null> } [params] - Custom component init params.

节点.功能描述: Callback function invoked from the native side function 'CustomNodeBase::SetRecycleFunction' when the component is about to be recycled. It first calls the `aboutToRecycle` function in the application, and performs the necessary actions defined in the application before recycling. Then, it freezes the component to avoid performing UI updates when its in recycle pool Finally recursively traverses all subcomponents, calling `aboutToRecycle` on each subcomponent that is about to be recycled, preparing them for recycling as well.
Enum for Lifecycle State type
Lifecycle init state. Custom components are in this state when they are created. The next state after the init state is the appear state, which will trigger aboutToAppear.
Lifecycle appeared state. Custom components are in this stage when they are about to be built. The next state after the appeared state is the built state, which will trigger onDidBuild.
Lifecycle built state. The next state after the built state could be the recycled state, or it could transfer to the disappeared state.
Lifecycle recycled state. Custom components are in a state of being recycled or reused. The next state after the recycle state could be the built state, or it could transfer to the disappeared state.
Lifecycle disappeared state. The disappeared state is the end state of a custom component's lifecycle. The init, built, or recycled states could transfer to the disappeared state.
Function that returns default creator.
Function that returns reason type when error.
注释信息: @param { string } key persisted key when error
@param { string } message more message when error

节点.功能描述: All collection classes supported by PersistenceV2
注释信息: @typedef { Array<S> | Map<string | number, S> | Set<S> | collections.Array<S> | collections.Map<string | number, S> | collections.Set<S> } CollectionType<S>

节点.功能描述: Function that returns PropertyDecorator.
Define Type PropertyDecorator, adds type information to an object.
Defining the task callback.
Function that returns monitor instance value when state variable is changed.
注释信息: @param { IMonitor} monitorValue monitor instance value when state variable is changed.

节点.功能描述: Getter callback type. It is used to get value.
Setter callback type. It is used to assign a new value.
注释信息: @param { T } newValue - update the value with newValue.

节点.功能描述: Define ComponentInit PropertyDecorator. When a custom component initialization is about to be completed, the function decorated by the decorator will be executed. Developers can modify state variables in this stage.

Define ComponentAppear PropertyDecorator. The function decorated by the decorator is executed after a new instance of the custom component is created, before its build() function is executed. Developers can modify state variables at this stage.

Define ComponentBuilt PropertyDecorator. The function decorated by the decorator is executed after a new instance of the custom component is built, after its build() function is executed. Developers can implement functions that do not affect the actual UI, such as event data reporting at this stage.

Define ComponentReuse PropertyDecorator. The function decorated by the decorator is invoked when a reusable custom component is re-added to the node tree from the reuse cache to receive construction parameters of the component.

Define ComponentRecycle PropertyDecorator. The function decorated by the decorator is invoked from the native side function 'CustomNodeBase::SetRecycleFunction' when the component is about to be recycled. It first calls the function in the application, and performs the necessary actions defined in the application before recycling. Then, it freezes the component to avoid performing UI updates when its in recycle pool Finally recursively traverses all subcomponents, calling the function on each subcomponent that is about to be recycled, preparing them for recycling as well.

The function decorated by the decorator is invoked before a custom component is destroyed. It is not allowed to change state variables within the function, especially since modifying @Link variables may lead to unstable application behavior.
